hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then cd /workspace && if ! bun run check 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Lint/typecheck failed. Fix issues before committing."}}'; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'gh pr create'; then cd /workspace && if ! (bun run check && bun run test && bun run build) 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CI checks failed (lint/test/build). Fix issues before opening PR."}}'; fi; fi; }
hooks.statusMessage: Running full CI checks (lint, test, build)...
